ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization that the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., department, university) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the author's affiliation */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* JSON array of research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number indicating the order of authorship */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword related to a publication */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword (e.g., subject area, methodology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "funding_number" TEXT /* Funding number associated with the publication */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that received the funding */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of funding */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding received */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)
column_names: Name of the organization that the author is affiliated with
Affiliation of the author (e.g., department, university)
JSON array of research interests of the author
Sequence number indicating the order of authorship
Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, co-author)
Category of the keyword (e.g., subject area, methodology)
Unique identifier for each funding record
Funding number associated with the publication
ID of the publication that received the funding
Status of the funding (e.g., active, completed)
